# UC-12.3.16 · AWX Activity Stream Privileged Object Changes

## Description

Credential and EE changes must be traceable for break-glass and supply-chain audits.

## Value

Captures who changed automation credentials and execution environments.

## Implementation

Route to restricted index; retain per policy. Join actors to IdP username format.

## SPL

```spl
index=automation sourcetype="awx:activity_stream" logger_name="awx.analytics.activity_stream"
| search object1="*credential*" OR object1="*execution_environment*" OR operation="create" OR operation="delete"
| stats count by actor, operation, object1
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (actor × operation), Timeline.

## References

- [AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)](https://github.com/ansible/awx/blob/devel/docs/logging_integration.md)
